titleStmt.title: SII 20.106: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 106. (B.K. No. 46 of 1937-38.) NĀDA (KHURD), INDI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab standing near the village Chāvaḍi.

summary.p: This record is dated in the king's regnal year 9, Ānanda, Kārttika, śu. [6] Thursday, corresponding to A.D. 1134, October 25.

The inscription records a gift of land, oil-mill, garden and house-site to the temple of Chaṇḍēśvara, after consecrating the image, by Chaṇḍimarasa of Chikkanāḍu. It also records a gift of toll income from the Mummuridaṇḍas to the same temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:

garāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya saṁbhavē . © svasti samastabhu
vanāśraya śrī prithvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirājaṁ paramēśvara pa
ramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ
śrīmatsarvvagñacakravartti bhūlōkamalladēva varṣada 9 neyānaṁda saṁ
vatsarada kārttika suddha 6 bṟihavāradaṁdu mūvattāṟuṁbā
ḍada baḷiya bāḍaṁ cikkanāḍa prabhu caṁḍimarasaru śrī
caṁḍēśvaradēvara pratiṣṭheyaṁ māḍi Ā dēvara khaṁḍaspuṭita
jīrṇnōdhāra pūjepunaskāra naivēdyakye sarvvanamaśyavāgi
dhārāpūrbbakaṁ māḍi biṭṭa mattaru 9 gāṇa 1 tōṁṭa ma
ttaru 1 dēvālyayadiṁ paḍuvalu 10 kayya Agala nīḷa 15 nivēśana
nāḍu muṁmuridaṁḍaṁgaḷu biṭṭaru hoṁge koṭṭalli mā
na 1 koṇḍalli māna 1 hēṟiṁge 25 Ele hoṁge
2 Aḍake . ©
Digital edition of SII 20.106 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
